name: ki-skill
description: Cross-tool skill manager for AI coding assistants
author: Level

scripts.build:macos: bun build ./src/cli.ts --compile --target=darwin-x64 --outfile dist/ki-darwin-x64 && bun build ./src/cli.ts --compile --target=darwin-arm64 --outfile dist/ki-darwin-arm64
scripts.build:all: bun run build:macos && bun run build:linux && bun run build:windows
